display_text: Dezun Bloodrite, Tier 5: Neutral item that grants the Blood Invocation passive, causing spells to have a 16% larger Area of Effect but additionally cost health equal to 35% of their mana cost. This is a high-tier trade-off item that massively scales a hero's spell-clear and team fight impact at the cost of significant HP expenditure per cast. Use cautiously on heroes with innate spell lifesteal, high health pools, or built-in sustain to offset the health penalty. Stats: AOE Increase: +16%, Health Cost Multiplier: 35%.
